changeText: 没有服务器匹配你的搜索

changeText: 使用示例服务器创建新的 MCP 配置

changeText: 登录以查看云端 MCP 服务器

changeText: 无法加载云端 MCP 服务器
暂无用户 MCP 服务器

changeText: 无法加载工作区 MCP 服务器

originalText: Plugins give your agents important context
changeText: 插件能为你的智能体提供重要上下文

originalText: Provide domain-specific knowledge and workflows for the agent
changeText: 为智能体提供特定领域的知识和工作流

originalText: Include third-party Plugins, Skills, and other configs
changeText: 包含第三方插件、技能和其他配置

originalText: Automatically import agent configs from other tools
changeText: 自动从其他工具导入智能体配置
添加智能体、上下文和工具
添加智能体、上下文和工具...

originalText: Automate repetitive tasks with always-on cloud agents that respond to environment triggers.
changeText: 借助始终在线的云端智能体自动执行重复任务，并响应环境触发器。

originalText: Run agents on a schedule or automatically in response to events. Billed at plan rates.
changeText: 按计划运行智能体，或在事件触发时自动运行。按套餐标准计费。

originalText: Analyze recent commits for high-severity correctness bugs and submit safe fixes
changeText: 分析最近提交中的高严重性正确性缺陷，并提交安全修复方案

originalText: Post a daily Slack digest summarizing notable repository changes and risks from the previous day
changeText: 在 Slack 中发布每日摘要，总结前一天仓库的重要变更与风险

originalText: Show system notifications when Agent completes or needs attention
changeText: 在智能体完成任务或需要你处理时显示系统通知
显示应用内警告级提示
在系统托盘中显示 Cursor

originalText: Partially mask your email address in the Cursor user interface
changeText: 在 Cursor 界面中部分隐藏你的邮箱地址

originalText: Cursor periodically removes old worktrees to free disk space. Tune how aggressively cleanup runs.
changeText: Cursor 会定期移除旧工作树以释放磁盘空间。可调整清理的积极程度。

originalText: Maximum number of Cursor-managed worktrees to retain across all workspaces. Older worktrees are removed first.
changeText: 跨所有工作区保留的 Cursor 托管工作树最大数量。较旧的工作树会优先移除。

originalText: Maximum total size in GB across all Cursor-managed worktrees. Set to 0 to disable the size limit.
changeText: 所有 Cursor 托管工作树的总大小上限（GB）。设为 0 可禁用大小限制。

originalText: No Cursor-managed worktrees on this machine.
changeText: 此机器上暂无 Cursor 托管的工作树。

originalText: Your codebase, prompts, edits and other usage data will be stored and trained on by Cursor to improve the product.
changeText: 你的代码库、提示词、编辑内容和其他使用数据会被 Cursor 存储并用于训练，以改进产品。

originalText: Your prompts, edits and other usage data will be stored and trained on by Cursor to improve the product.
changeText: 你的提示词、编辑内容和其他使用数据会被 Cursor 存储并用于训练，以改进产品。

originalText: . Prompts and limited telemetry may also be shared with model providers when you explicitly select their models
changeText: 。当你明确选择某个模型时，提示词和少量遥测数据也可能会共享给对应的模型提供方
由管理员控制，无法更改

originalText: No training. Code may be stored for Background Agent and other features.
changeText: 不用于训练。代码可能会因后台 Agent 和其他功能而被存储。

originalText: Data Sharing is paused for your first day of usage.
changeText: 数据共享在你使用的第一天会暂停。

originalText: No training and no storage. Background Agent and other features that require code storage will be disabled.
changeText: 不训练也不存储。后台 Agent 和其他需要存储代码的功能将被禁用。

originalText: Choose between light, dark, or high contrast themes
changeText: 在浅色、深色和高对比主题之间选择

originalText: Replace translucent surfaces with opaque backgrounds
changeText: 用不透明背景替代半透明界面

originalText: Font size for the Cursor user interface
Font size for code editors and diffs
changeText: 代码编辑器和差异视图的字体大小

originalText: Override the Cursor user interface typeface
changeText: 覆盖 Cursor 界面字体

originalText: Override the font for code editors and diffs
changeText: 覆盖代码编辑器和差异视图字体

originalText: Limit how many chat tabs can be open at once
changeText: 限制可同时打开的对话标签页数量

originalText: When to show the usage summary at the bottom of the chat pane
changeText: 何时在对话面板底部显示用量摘要

originalText: Show Add to Chat & Quick Edit buttons when selecting code
changeText: 选中代码时显示“添加到对话”和“快速编辑”按钮

originalText: Use themed background colors for inline code diffs
changeText: 为行内代码差异使用主题背景色
编辑器为空时自动隐藏

originalText: When all editors are closed, hide the editor area and maximize chat
changeText: 关闭所有编辑器后，隐藏编辑器区域并最大化对话区
将对话作为编辑器标签页打开
在浏览器中显示 Localhost 链接

originalText: Automatically open localhost links in the Browser Tab
changeText: 自动在浏览器标签页中打开 localhost 链接

originalText: Try a new window for running parallel agents
changeText: 试试新开一个窗口运行并行智能体
将文件夹添加到工作区...
没有可用的 MCP 资源

originalText: Enter a GitHub repository URL containing a plugin marketplace
changeText: 输入一个包含插件市场的 GitHub 仓库 URL

originalText: This marketplace has already been imported. The plugins should already be available.
changeText: 该市场已导入，相关插件应该已经可用

originalText: Only extensions that are available in the Cursor Marketplace can be imported.
changeText: 只有 Cursor 插件市场中可用的扩展才能被导入

originalText: Try a different search term or browse by category
changeText: 试试其他搜索词，或按分类浏览

originalText: Premium models are only available on paid plans.
changeText: 高级模型仅在付费套餐中可用。

originalText: Connect GitHub to create, update, and merge pull requests directly in Cursor.
changeText: 连接 GitHub，即可直接在 Cursor 中创建、更新和合并拉取请求。

originalText: Entry-level plan with access to premium models, unlimited Tab completions, and more.
changeText: 入门版计划，支持高级模型、无限 Tab 补全等更多功能。

originalText: Are you sure you want to quit?
Are you sure you want to close this window?
changeText: 你确定要关闭此窗口吗？

originalText: Select a window to switch to
Plan, Build, / for skills, @ for context
changeText: 规划、构建，/ 用于技能，@ 用于上下文

originalText: Build a plan before starting code to improve agent execution. Use /plan to get started
changeText: 在开始编写代码前先制定计划，以提升智能体执行效果。使用 /plan 开始。

originalText: Use /multi-model-review to get an adversarial code review from several models
changeText: 使用 /multi-model-review 可从多个模型获得对抗式代码审查

originalText: After long sessions, use /split-to-prs to turn your work into small, reviewable PRs
changeText: 长时间会话后，使用 /split-to-prs 将你的工作拆分为小型、易于审查的 PR

originalText: Plugins help you customize Cursor for your workflows. Use /add-plugin to get started
changeText: 插件可帮助你按工作流自定义 Cursor。使用 /add-plugin 开始。

originalText: Skills extend Cursor with specialized knowledge. Use /create-skill to get started
changeText: 技能可为 Cursor 扩展专业化知识。使用 /create-skill 开始。

originalText: Use /create-skill to customize Cursor for your workflows
changeText: 使用 /create-skill 按你的工作流自定义 Cursor

originalText: Use /canvas to get interactive visualizations like dashboards from Cursor
changeText: 使用 /canvas 从 Cursor 获取仪表盘等交互式可视化

originalText: Cursor can respond with interactive visualizations alongside text. Use /canvas to get started
changeText: Cursor 可以在文本旁生成交互式可视化。使用 /canvas 开始。

originalText: Plan Mode improves agent outcomes and accuracy. Use shift+tab to enable
changeText: 规划模式可提升智能体结果与准确性。使用 shift+tab 启用

originalText: Use MCPs to give Cursor access to tools and data. Configure MCPs in your Cursor Settings
changeText: 使用 MCP 让 Cursor 访问工具和数据。请在 Cursor 设置中配置 MCP

originalText: Use /shell to run commands in the terminal
changeText: 使用 /shell 在终端中运行命令

originalText: Drag and drop agent chats to split your view into tiled panes
changeText: 拖放智能体对话即可将视图拆分为平铺窗格

originalText: Use /multitask to run subagents to parallelize your requests instead of queuing them
changeText: 使用 /multitask 运行子智能体，以并行处理你的请求，而不是将它们排队等待
使用 /in-cloud 启用云端子智能体

originalText: Voice mode lets you dictate better prompts. Click or hold ctrl+M to enable
changeText: 语音模式可帮助你口述出更好的提示词。点击或按住 ctrl+M 启用

originalText: Use ctrl + D to split your view into tiled panes
changeText: 使用 ctrl + D 将视图拆分为平铺窗格

originalText: Use /create-rule to control agent behavior through system-level instructions
changeText: 使用 /create-rule 通过系统级指令控制智能体行为

originalText: Use /debug to solve bugs that are hard to reproduce or understand
changeText: 使用 /debug 解决难以复现或理解的 Bug

originalText: Use /bisect to find the exact commit that introduced a certain bug
changeText: 使用 /bisect 找到引入某个缺陷的准确提交

originalText: Use /create-subagent to set up specialized agents that Cursor can use to parallelize work
changeText: 使用 /create-subagent 设置 Cursor 可用于并行工作的专用智能体

originalText: Create a multi-root workspace so Cursor can work across many repos at once
changeText: 创建多根工作区，让 Cursor 可以一次处理多个仓库

originalText: Use /model to pick the best model for your task. Composer offers a great balance for cost vs. capability
changeText: 使用 /model 为你的任务选择最合适的模型。Composer 在成本与能力之间提供了很好的平衡

originalText: Use cloud agents for better parallelization and durable execution. Go to cursor.com/agents
changeText: 使用云端智能体可获得更好的并行化与持久执行能力。前往 cursor.com/agents

originalText: Debug Mode reproduces and solves hard bugs. Use shift+tab to enable
changeText: 调试模式可复现并解决棘手的 Bug。使用 shift+tab 启用

originalText: The best way to code with AI
changeText: 用 AI 编码的最佳方式
在 Prompt Quality 中打开

originalText: Control how strongly the tint is applied
Add a custom MCP tool in your user MCP config.
changeText: 在你的用户 MCP 配置中添加自定义 MCP 工具。

originalText: Configure MCP servers in the dashboard to make them available in Cursor on desktop and in the cloud.
changeText: 在控制台中配置 MCP 服务器，使其可在桌面端和云端的 Cursor 中使用。
配置团队 MCP 服务器

originalText: Adjust how much detail is shown for tool calls
changeText: 调整工具调用显示的细节程度

originalText: Adjust the default behavior of sending a message while Agent is running
changeText: 调整 Agent 运行时发送消息的默认行为
在提示 Agent 时提供上下文建议

originalText: Show rotating tips on the empty screen
changeText: 在空白界面轮换显示提示

originalText: Allow Agent to switch modes without asking first, such as Agent to Plan or Agent to Debug. When off, Cursor asks before switching.
changeText: 允许 Agent 无需事先询问即可切换模式，例如从 Agent 切换到 Plan 或从 Agent 切换到 Debug。关闭后，Cursor 会在切换前询问。

originalText: The Explore subagent is used to do initial research for the main agent
changeText: Explore 子智能体用于为主智能体执行初步研究

originalText: Skip approval dialog; Agent may run web searches automatically
changeText: 跳过批准对话框；Agent 可自动执行网页搜索

originalText: Glob patterns for files where Cursor Tab will not suggest
changeText: 用于指定 Cursor Tab 不提供建议的文件匹配模式
已连接到浏览器标签页
在浏览器中打开网页链接

originalText: Automatically open http and https links in the Browser Tab
changeText: 自动在浏览器标签页中打开 http 和 https 链接
此工作区中可用的服务器。

originalText: Hooks let you run custom scripts at specific points during the agent's execution to modify behavior, enforce policies, or add custom logging.
changeText: Hooks 允许你在智能体执行过程中的特定时机运行自定义脚本，以修改行为、强制执行策略或添加自定义日志。
暂无 Hook 执行记录
为 Instant Grep 索引仓库

originalText: Automatically index repositories to speed up Grep searches. All data is stored locally.
changeText: 自动索引仓库以加快 Grep 搜索。所有数据均存储在本地。

originalText: These domains must be accessible for Cursor to function. Add them to your firewall or proxy allowlist.
changeText: 这些域名必须可访问，Cursor 才能正常运行。请将它们添加到防火墙或代理的允许列表中。

originalText: Check network connectivity to all Cursor services
changeText: 检查与所有 Cursor 服务的网络连接情况

originalText: Log extension host RPC messages to JSON files viewable in Perfetto for performance analysis. Requires a restart to take effect.
changeText: 将扩展宿主 RPC 消息记录为可在 Perfetto 中查看的 JSON 文件以进行性能分析。需要重启后生效。

originalText: Use /loop to run a prompt on a schedule or keep a local agent running continuously
changeText: 使用 /loop 可按计划运行提示词，或让本地智能体持续运行

originalText: Minimize interface animations. System follows your OS preference.
changeText: 尽量减少界面动画。跟随系统时会遵循你的操作系统偏好。

originalText: Allow Agent to fetch content from URLs
changeText: 允许 Agent 从 URL 抓取内容

originalText: Apply .cursorignore files to all subdirectories. Changing this setting will require a restart of Cursor.
changeText: 将 .cursorignore 文件应用到所有子目录。更改此设置需要重启 Cursor。

originalText: ⚠️ Use with caution. Skip symlinks during .cursorignore file discovery. Only enable if your repository has many symlinks and all .cursorignore files are reachable without them. Changing this setting will require a restart of Cursor.
changeText: ⚠️ 请谨慎使用。在 .cursorignore 文件发现过程中跳过符号链接。只有在你的仓库包含大量符号链接，且不依赖它们也能访问到所有 .cursorignore 文件时，才建议启用。更改此设置需要重启 Cursor。

originalText: Approvals & Execution for commands, MCP and more
changeText: 命令、MCP 等的审批与执行

originalText: Choose how Agents run tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes.
changeText: 选择 Agent 如何运行命令执行、MCP 和文件写入等工具。

originalText: Many commands will run automatically inside the sandbox, and you can also allowlist other actions.
changeText: 许多命令会在沙箱内自动运行，你也可以将其他操作加入允许列表。

originalText: Ask for permission before running each operation
changeText: 在运行每个操作前请求许可

originalText: Tools will auto-run in a sandbox if possible, otherwise respect the allowlist or ask for approval
changeText: 工具会尽可能在沙箱中自动运行，否则遵循允许列表或请求批准

originalText: Automatically run operations after you approve them once
changeText: 在你批准一次后自动运行这些操作

originalText: Control which network requests are allowed when commands run in the sandbox.
changeText: 控制命令在沙箱中运行时允许哪些网络请求。

originalText: Edit allowed/denied domains in sandbox.json in your workspace.
changeText: 在工作区的 sandbox.json 中编辑允许或拒绝的域名。

originalText: MCP tools that can run automatically. Format: 'server:tool', 'server:*' for all tools from a server, '*:tool' for a tool from any server, or *:* for all tools from all servers
changeText: 可自动运行的 MCP 工具。格式：'server:tool'、'server:*' 表示某个服务器的全部工具，'*:tool' 表示任意服务器中的某个工具，*:* 表示所有服务器的全部工具

originalText: Domains that Agent can fetch from automatically. Use '*' for all domains, '*.example.com' for wildcard subdomains.
changeText: Agent 可自动抓取的域名。使用 '*' 表示所有域名，'*.example.com' 表示通配子域名。

originalText: Prevent Agent from automatically running Browser tools
changeText: 防止 Agent 自动运行浏览器工具

originalText: Prevent Agent from automatically running MCP tools
changeText: 防止 Agent 自动运行 MCP 工具

originalText: Prevent Agent from deleting files automatically
changeText: 防止 Agent 自动删除文件

originalText: Prevent Agent from creating or modifying files outside of the workspace automatically
changeText: 防止 Agent 自动在工作区外创建或修改文件

originalText: Use the legacy terminal tool in agent mode, for use on systems with unsupported shell configurations
changeText: 在 Agent 模式下使用旧版终端工具，适用于 Shell 配置不受支持的系统

originalText: Custom keywords that trigger auto-submit in voice mode. Only single words (no spaces) are allowed. Punctuation and capitalization are ignored.
changeText: 在语音模式下触发自动提交的自定义关键词。仅允许单个词（不含空格）。会忽略标点和大小写。

originalText: Mark Agent commits as 'Made with Cursor'
changeText: 将 Agent 提交标记为 'Made with Cursor'

originalText: Mark pull requests as made with Cursor
changeText: 将拉取请求标记为由 Cursor 创建

originalText: Prefix for new branches created by Agent (e.g., cursor/, username/)
changeText: Agent 创建新分支时使用的前缀（例如：cursor/、username/）

originalText: Extend Cursor with Skills, Rules, Agents, Hooks, and MCPs
changeText: 使用技能、规则、智能体、钩子和 MCP 扩展 Cursor

originalText: Use Rules to guide agent behavior, like enforcing best practices or coding standards. Rules can be applied always, by file path, or manually.
changeText: 使用规则来引导智能体行为，例如强制执行最佳实践或编码规范。规则可以始终应用、按文件路径应用，或手动触发。

originalText: Skills are specialized capabilities that help the agent accomplish specific tasks. Skills will be invoked by the agent when relevant or can be triggered manually with / in chat.
changeText: 技能是帮助智能体完成特定任务的专门能力。智能体会在相关时自动调用技能，也可以在聊天中通过 / 手动触发。

originalText: Create specialized agents for complex tasks. Subagents can be invoked by the agent to handle focused work in parallel.
changeText: 为复杂任务创建专门的智能体。子智能体可以由主智能体调用，并行处理聚焦工作。

originalText: Create reusable workflows triggered with / prefix in chat. Use commands to standardize processes and make common tasks more efficient.
changeText: 创建可在聊天中通过 / 前缀触发的可复用工作流。使用命令来标准化流程，让常见任务更高效。

originalText: Create specialized agents to handle focused tasks
changeText: 创建子智能体来处理聚焦任务

originalText: Create commands to build reusable workflows
changeText: 创建命令来构建可复用工作流

originalText: Prompts and limited telemetry may also be shared with model providers when you explicitly select their models.
changeText: 当你明确选择某个模型时，提示词和少量遥测数据也可能会共享给对应的模型提供方。

originalText: Use /automate to create Cursor Automations without leaving your agent chat
changeText: 使用 /automate 在不离开代理聊天的情况下创建 Cursor 自动化
没有打开的工作区文件夹
推荐好友，赚取使用额度

originalText: Earn up to $250 every month by referring friends. They get 50% off their first month; you get $25 in usage credit when they buy a plan. Valid for 10 rewards per month.
changeText: 每月通过推荐好友最多可赚取 $250。他们首月享受 5 折优惠；当他们购买套餐时，你可获得 $25 的使用额度。每月最多 10 次奖励。

originalText: Balanced quality and speed, recommended for most tasks
changeText: 质量与速度均衡，适合大多数任务

originalText: Select Composer in your model picker for a great balance of intelligence and cost
changeText: 在模型选择器中选择 Composer，在智能与成本之间取得良好平衡

originalText: Use a Git repository to track changes
changeText: 使用 Git 仓库跟踪变更
